name: fluxer-native
description: Pure Native Capacitor Wrapper for Fluxer

scripts.build: export ANDROID_HOME=$PREFIX/opt/Android/sdk && export JAVA_HOME=$PREFIX/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk && export PATH=$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$PATH && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug -Dandroid.aapt2.executable=$PREFIX/bin/aapt2
scripts.build:release: export ANDROID_HOME=$PREFIX/opt/Android/sdk && export JAVA_HOME=$PREFIX/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk && export PATH=$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$PATH && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease -Dandroid.aapt2.executable=$PREFIX/bin/aapt2
scripts.release: npm run sync && npm run build && npm run open
scripts.release:signed: npm run sync && npm run build:release && npm run open:release
